creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I committed your port with a small modification to the pkg-comment. 
It's rather difficult to get these right since we use a "summary" 
style rather than a complete sentence.  

In any case, thank you for this submission, having a WOL 
packet generator is something I've wanted for quite a while 
now. ;)
